nasb.text: But the bull and its hide and its flesh and its refuse he burned in the fire outside the camp, just as the Lord had commanded Moses.

esv.text: But the bull and its skin and its flesh and its dung he burned up with fire outside the camp, as the Lord commanded Moses.

cnv.text: 至於那公牛，牠的皮、肉和糞，都要在營外用火燒掉，都是照著耶和華吩咐摩西的。

ccb.text: 又照耶和华的吩咐，把公牛的皮、肉和粪便带到营外烧掉。
